nasb.text: The Levites were numbered from thirty years old and upward, and their number by census of men was 38,000.

esv.text: The Levites, thirty years old and upward, were numbered, and the total was 38,000 men.

cnv.text: 利未人自三十歲及以上的都被數點；按統計，他們男丁的數目，共有三萬八千人。

ccb.text: 凡三十岁以上的利未人都在统计之列，共有三万八千男子，
